caption: In an indoor setting with vertical wooden paneling, two performers stand before a seated audience. A woman on the left wears a light green cardigan over a colorful scarf, and a man on the right wears a white collared shirt under a dark vest. The man holds a lute-like instrument and stands before a microphone on a stand. In the initial sequence, the woman looks toward the man, who appears to be singing. As the scene progresses, the woman raises her left arm and points toward the right, holding a piece of white paper. The man continues to hold his instrument, his expression remaining focused. In the foreground, the backs of several audience members' heads are visible. The text "ORCA" appears in the lower right corner of each frame.
